summary: Completed testing of pattern rendering fix. Both Double Top (4H) and Loose Range (1D) patterns are successfully detected and rendered on the chart with proper lines, labels, and pattern cards. Pattern render functionality is working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: No V8_HISTORY_SCAN metadata found in API responses
minor_issues.impact: Metadata missing but core functionality works

minor_issues.issue: Console error: priceSeries.setMarkers is not a function
minor_issues.impact: Does not break pattern rendering - price lines work correctly
Does not break functionality - data loads via HTTP APIs

passed_tests: ✅ BTC 1D API returns loose_range pattern with correct interpretation
✅ BTC 4H API returns double_top pattern with correct interpretation
✅ Frontend loads and displays technical analysis module correctly
✅ Double Top pattern renders on 4H chart with peaks and neckline
✅ Loose Range pattern renders on 1D chart with resistance and support lines
✅ Pattern lines have labels on right axis (Peak 1, Peak 2, Neckline, Resistance, Support)
✅ Pattern card shows detected patterns with correct information
✅ 4H Analysis shows 'Double Top suggests short-term neutral pressure'
✅ 1D Analysis shows 'Loose Range structure is developing'
✅ Market Narrative displays pattern descriptions correctly
✅ MTF Summary Bar shows multi-timeframe analysis
✅ MTF Alignment shows direction and confidence
✅ Pattern rendering uses priceLine instead of LineSeries for stability
✅ Chart displays with proper candlestick data (200 candles 4H, 150 candles 1D)
✅ Structure swings and levels rendering correctly
✅ Timeframe switching works correctly between 1D and 4H
